title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud Run introduces new serverless features designed to simplify deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. The updates emphasize seamless scaling and reduced operational overhead for next-generation AI-driven applications.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through new Cloud Run features aimed at deploying AI agents and inference workloads on a serverless platform. It matters because it targets the operational overhead that typically comes with running next-generation AI applications. The key takeaways: the updates emphasize seamless scaling and reduced operational management, and they extend Cloud Run's serverless model toward AI agents and local inference.
